sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer First Name`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Middle Name`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Last Name`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Internet E-mail`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Organization`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Department`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Phone Number`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`InstanceId`
from `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Company`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Region`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Site Group`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Site`
 from `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
 where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Status`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Status Reason`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Priority`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Actual Start Date`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Actual End Date`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Scheduled Start Date`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Scheduled End Date`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Completed Date`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order Type`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Vendor Ticket Number`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Summary`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Business Service`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Detailed Description`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Vendor Group`,
   `FIN:Costs`.`Cost Center Code`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` left outer join `AR System Schema`.`FIN:Costs` on(
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` = `FIN:Costs`.`Company`
) 
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 1`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 2`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 3`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Product Cat Tier 1(2)`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Product Cat Tier 2 (2)`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Product Cat Tier 3 (2)`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Product Model/Version (2)`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Manufacturer (2)`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Support Group Name`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`ASGRP`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Request Assignee`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Request Manager`
From `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`
where (
`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` in ($WO_ID) 
);

SELECT DISTINCT
          TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.`Task ID` AS `TaskID`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskType AS `TaskType`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskName AS `TaskName`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Status AS `Status`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Sequence AS `Sequence`
 
FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` WorkOrder_Archive LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`TMS:Task_Archive` TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE
     ON ( WorkOrder_Archive.`Work Order ID` = TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.RootRequestID )
    WHERE WorkOrder_Archive.`Work Order ID` = ${WO_ID}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`"}
list.label: Company
list.name: company
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Support Group Name` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` WHERE  `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` in ($company)"}
list.label: Assigned Group
list.name: AssignedGroup
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Support Group Name` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` WHERE  `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` in ($company)"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` WHERE `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` in ($company) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Priority` in ($priority) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Status` in ($Status) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Support Group Name` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
list.label: Work Order ID
list.name: WO_ID
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Work Order ID` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder_Archive` WHERE `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Customer Company` in ($company) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Priority` in ($priority) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Status` in ($Status) AND `WOI:WorkOrder_Archive`.`Support Group Name` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
